name: pin-content-gate
description: Bcrypt-protected PIN gate using a session cookie. Use to restrict access to a section of your app (adult content, paid tier, internal pages) on top of normal auth. Admin route to set/reset the PIN, user keypad component, verify endpoint.

endpoints: POST /api/gate/verify-pin — set the unlock cookie if PIN matches
POST /api/admin/gate-pin — set or replace the PIN (admin)

postInstall: 1. Make sure you have a `settings(key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL)` table — create with db/migrations/pin-gate.sql if not
2. Adjust PIN_GATE_CONFIG in lib/pin-gate.ts (cookie name, hash key, min length) if you want multiple gates

3. In your protected page/layout, check the cookie server-side: const cookieStore = cookies(); if (!cookieStore.get(PIN_GATE_CONFIG.cookieName)) return <PinGate verifyEndpoint='/api/gate/verify-pin' />;
4. Admin sets the PIN via POST /api/admin/gate-pin with body { pin }
5. Cookie is session-only by default — user re-enters after closing the browser. Add maxAge in verify-pin.ts if you want persistence
